item.title: 长鑫存储IPO标志着中国DRAM里程碑的到来； HBM 现在将竞争者与领先者区分开来
item.summary: ChangXin Memory Technologies (CXMT) opened subscriptions for its STAR Market IPO on July 16, launching one of China's largest A-share listings of 2026 and marking the country's first complete DRAM journey from technology acquisition and manufacturing validation to mass production and capital market recognition.
